_meta.calibration: Calibrated from real CAM frames + actual YOLO track trajectories on the ~2-min clips. Camera roles per problem statement: cam1/cam2 = store interior (browse zones), cam3 = outside main entrance (footfall line), cam5 = entrance + billing (cash counter). cam4 = store room (no customer zones, omitted). Coordinates are in each camera's own 1920x1080 pixel space; the funnel fuses cameras by 5-minute time bucket, NOT by cross-camera identity (deliberately out of scope).
_meta.feet_point: events use bbox bottom-center (person's floor position)

entry_line._note: Vertical line at the threshold; customers cross right(mall)->left(store) to enter. Tracks cluster near x=1640-1810 here.

cam1._role: interior browse (left brand wall + center aisle + right display)

left_shelf._note: The Face Shop / derma wall on the left.

center_aisle._note: Central walking aisle into the store.

cam2._role: interior browse (diagonal to cam1: makeup brand walls)

makeup_wall._note: Lakme / Faces Canada / Maybelline shelf wall (right).

cam5._role: billing (entrance + cash counter); footfall intentionally NOT counted here to avoid double-counting cam3

cash_counter._note: Floor area around the white billing desk with the two laptops.
